description: Tests SSE streaming responses, tool-call event chains, and streaming completion. Covers the todo list, step events, and multi-tool orchestration.

cases._comment: Purpose: Verify basic streaming response (no tool call). Mechanism: Simple greeting returns complete streaming response. Verification: Check response contains BrachyBot self-introduction.

Purpose: Verify SSE contains step events during tool calls. Mechanism: ctv_segmentation tool is called and output marker appears. Verification: Check CTV segmentation completion confirmation in response.

cases.input: Run the complete brachytherapy planning pipeline
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify SSE event stream for 5-step pipeline. Mechanism: planning_pipeline tool is called, all 5 sub-steps have events. Verification: Check response contains keywords for all 5 stages.

Purpose: Verify response is not truncated after streaming completes. Mechanism: Complete analysis result is returned. Verification: Check response contains complete analysis data like Dimensions/512/HU.

Purpose: Verify event stream for sequential multi-tool calls. Mechanism: Two tools execute sequentially and each returns results. Verification: Check both segmentation and dose are completed in response.

cases.input: Analyze this CT comprehensively and generate a full report
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify long response is not truncated. Mechanism: Complete analysis + report content is returned (>500 chars). Verification: Check response has both analysis and report sections.
Purpose: Verify simple tool responds quickly. Mechanism: Viewer switch command is processed quickly. Verification: Check viewer switch confirmation in response.
Purpose: Verify Chinese streaming output. Mechanism: Chinese input produces Chinese streaming response. Verification: Check response is in Chinese and contains analysis and segmentation results.

cases.input: What tools do you have available?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify list response without tool calls. Mechanism: Returns list of available tools instead of trying to execute. Verification: Check response contains multiple tool names.

cases.input: Segment the image and show me the 3D view
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify combined tool event stream. Mechanism: segmentation + 3D display execute sequentially. Verification: Check segmentation completion and 3D viewer confirmation in response.
